reference_answer: A plot holder may transfer a plot only to a person already on the active waitlist.
The recipient must have attended at least three workdays in the current season.
Two missed watering shifts in a calendar month defines a hardship transfer.
A hardship exception allows it if the committee records a medical absence note.
A two-thirds vote with at least five committee members present is required.
The anti-speculation rule overrides the hardship exception.
The anti-speculation rule has precedence over every transfer exception.
Defer the transfer vote to the next regular meeting.
